raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally dispute several unauthorized charges and report ongoing issues regarding my account. 

Since opening this account, I have experienced consistent technical failures with the online payment system. Despite my attempts to pay by phone, I have been charged multiple {$29.00} late fees due to internal processing errors between XXXX XXXX and Citibank. 

Furthermore, I am disputing the following unauthorized charges from XX/XX/year>, totaling {$730.00} : - {$160.00} ( Camera system ) - {$230.00} ( Camera system ) - {$190.00} ( Construction radio ) - {$130.00} ( XXXX ) I did not purchase these items, and I do not own a camera system or a construction radio. Although I filed a dispute on XX/XX/year>, and received an acknowledgment on XX/XX/XXXX, I was notified on XX/XX/XXXX that I was being held responsible. These amounts were subsequently added back to my statement in XX/XX/year>. Additionally, I discovered that two cards were issued in my name, though I only possess one. 

On my XX/XX/year>, statement, I identified further suspicious charges totaling {$950.00} for which no information could be provided. Most recently, a representative refused to speak with my attorney and accountant, even after I provided verbal authorization. 

These ongoing issues have prevented me from taking advantage of no-interest promotions. While I am hesitant to pay the balance in full as it may complicate the refund process, I am continuing to make payments to avoid negative impacts on my credit report.

I am requesting a full investigation into these unauthorized charges, the removal of all associated late fees, and clarification regarding the second card issued in my name. I look forward to your immediate attention to this matter.
